name: TATSUMI Corporation
summary: TATSUMI Corporation manufactures and sells precision parts for cars, motorcycles, and industrial machinery in Japan and internationally. The company offers wiper system, power window, and starter motor parts; brake parts, ABS/ESC products for passenger cars, and brake master power parts; transmission parts; planetary gear shafts; and other parts that support brakes and engines of industrial and construction machinery. It also manufactures and sells heat and surface treatment machines. The company was formerly known as Tatsumi Seisakusho Co., Ltd. changed its name to TATSUMI Corporation in 1993. TATSUMI Corporation was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Ashikaga, Japan.
